summary: Educational notes app for students with comprehensive study material covering all subjects for classes 6 to 12, allowing browsing by class and subject
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Educational book stack illustration with warm tones for the home page hero section (books-hero.dim_1200x600.png)
- Simple notebook icon for representing individual notes (notebook-icon.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Create a home page with navigation to browse notes by class level (6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)
Create a subjects listing page that displays all available subjects for the selected class
Create a notes viewer page that displays all notes/topics for the selected class and subject combination
Design a creative educational theme with warm, academic colors (avoid blue and purple), clear typography suitable for reading study material, and a consistent visual style that promotes learning

new_feature_requests.summary: Notes content for classes 6 to 12 across all subjects
Create a backend data model to store educational notes with fields for class level (6-12), subject name, topic title, and note content
Implement backend methods to add, retrieve, and list notes filtered by class level and subject
Seed the backend with sample educational notes covering major subjects (Mathematics, Science, English, Social Studies, Hindi) for classes 6-12
